hero.title: GROPPI – Human Expertise, Powered by Smart Technology
hero.subtitle: Your Strategic Digital Partner Since 2016
hero.description: GROPPI was founded in Belgium in 2016 and is built on real experience, strategic insight, and lasting partnerships. With a multidisciplinary team of over 9 professionals, we support businesses in Belgium, Europe, and the Middle East with tailored digital solutions. We use AI as a smart accelerator, never as a replacement for human creativity or decision-making.

about.title: About GROPPI
about.subtitle: Our Story
about.description: GROPPI started in Belgium in 2016 and grew through years of hands-on experience, strong partnerships, and proven results. Today, we collaborate with clients across Europe and the Middle East, combining strategy, creativity, and technology to achieve sustainable digital growth.
about.missionText: Helping businesses grow through strategic digital solutions based on human expertise, supported by smart technology.
about.visionText: To be a trusted partner for businesses seeking sustainable digital growth, with a team that truly understands what works.
about.valuesText: Reliability, craftsmanship, transparency, and long-term relationships.

2016.title: Founded in Belgium
2016.description: GROPPI was founded with a clear vision: digital marketing with a personal approach.

2018.title: Team Expansion
2018.description: The team grew to 5 specialists with expertise in various domains.

2020.title: European Growth
2020.description: Successful collaborations with clients in the Netherlands, Germany, and France.

2023.title: Middle East
2023.description: Expansion to the Arab market through local partnerships.

ai.title: AI as a Supporting Force
ai.description: At GROPPI, we use artificial intelligence to accelerate processes, analyze data, and optimize performance. However, the vision, strategy, and creative decisions always remain in the hands of experienced professionals.
ai.subtitle: Technology in Service of People

services.title: Our Services
services.subtitle: What We Offer
services.description: We don't work with fixed packages. Every service is tailored to the client's objectives and executed by a specialized team, supported by smart technology where it adds value.
services.noResults: No services match your filter criteria.

aiContent.title: Visual Content & Branding
aiContent.description: Professional visual content and brand identity, supported by modern tools. From logo design to complete visual campaigns.

webDev.title: Website Design & Development
webDev.description: Custom-built, responsive websites that convert visitors into customers. Modern designs with optimal performance.

ecommerce.title: E-commerce Solutions
ecommerce.description: Complete webshop setup with payment integration, inventory management, and conversion optimization.

ads.title: Advertising Management
ads.description: Strategic advertising campaigns via Google, Meta, and other platforms. Data-driven optimization for maximum ROI.

seo.title: Search Engine Optimization
seo.description: Improve your organic visibility and rank higher in search engines. Technical SEO, content strategy, and link building.

social.title: Social Media Management
social.description: Full management of your social media presence. Content creation, scheduling, engagement, and growth strategies.

reputation.title: Reputation & Review Management
reputation.description: Build and protect your online reputation. Review management, response strategies, and brand monitoring.

dataSync.title: Data Synchronization
dataSync.description: Keep your business data synchronized across all platforms. Inventory, pricing, and product information management.

ai.title: Powered by Smart Technology
ai.description: We leverage modern technology to work more efficiently and deliver better results. Strategy and creative decisions always remain in the hands of our experienced team.

0.title: Introduction
0.description: We start with a free conversation to understand your business, goals, and challenges.

1.title: Custom Proposal
1.description: Based on your needs, we create a detailed proposal with transparent pricing and timeline.

2.title: Execution & Optimization
2.description: We implement the solution and continuously optimize based on results and feedback.
